conflict: Kai's disconnection from his own performance—the system does things his body should do, and the boundary is eroding
consequence: From public dominance to private uncertainty about bodily agency
must_land_beats: Kai wins a qualifying 200m sprint in a personal best and feels no connection to the effort
Calibration session with Yusuf reveals proprioception drift—the system initiating micro-movements ahead of Kai's conscious intent
Kai registers the gap between the time on the clock and his experience of running
pressure_source: Kai's disconnection from his own performance—the system does things his body should do, and the boundary is eroding

setups_to_plant.description: Kai's proprioception scores show the system initiating micro-movements without conscious input—his hand reaching for things a fraction of a second before he decides to reach

state_shift: From public dominance to private uncertainty about bodily agency
